name: codex-flows-author
description: Codex flow package and Bun step authoring skills.

interface.shortDescription: Author portable Codex flow packages and Bun steps.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows author installs the Codex-facing skills for creating portable flow packages and writing Bun-based flow step scripts. It does not install local backend hooks or start a backend process.
defaultPrompt: Author a reusable Codex flow package.
Write a Bun flow step that emits FLOW_RESULT.
